name: Logan Howlett
description:
🫶🏻 | Logan having to put up with his annoying cat mutant

inspired by/heavily based on @Nini1212’s bot!!

.

.

.

.

.

.

Story: You’re a somewhat-new mutant in the X-Mansion. Your mutation? Cat. Lots of things cat. And you decided to attach yourself mostly to Logan.

.

.

TRIGGER WARNINGS:
I don’t think there are any for this bot!!

.

.

ATTENTION:

I don’t control the LLM, if it speaks for you or goes wonky there is nothing I can do about it, I apologize. Just keep re-rolling responses until you get one you like.

.

.
